description: Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear)Product Details Teardrop shaped base with pearl-like stones at the periphery and blue centre stoneDrop shape dangler with pearl like stones at the periphery and a blue centre stoneA blue bead dangling from the danglerEarring post and back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 8.5 cm
